raw_transcript: That's a very common adaptation. EoE is an allergic inflammatory condition where white blood cells called eosinophils build up in the lining of the esophagus, causing it to narrow and become less elastic. We need to confirm this with an endoscopy.
final_corrected_note: That's a very common adaptation. EoE is an allergic inflammatory condition where white blood cells called eosinophils build up in the lining of the esophagus, causing it to narrow and become less elastic. We need to confirm this with an endoscopy.
